Package noppes.npcs.api.event

Interface IPlayerEvent

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ICustomNPCsEvent
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IAuctionEvent, IAuctionEvent.BidEvent, IAuctionEvent.BuyoutEvent, IAuctionEvent.CancelEvent, IAuctionEvent.ClaimEvent, IAuctionEvent.CreateEvent, ICustomGuiEvent, ICustomGuiEvent.ButtonEvent, ICustomGuiEvent.CloseEvent, ICustomGuiEvent.ScrollEvent, ICustomGuiEvent.SlotClickEvent, ICustomGuiEvent.SlotEvent, ICustomGuiEvent.UnfocusedEvent, IDialogEvent, IDialogEvent.DialogClosed, IDialogEvent.DialogOpen, IDialogEvent.DialogOption, IFactionEvent, IFactionEvent.FactionPoints, IPlayerEvent.AchievementEvent, IPlayerEvent.AttackedEvent, IPlayerEvent.AttackEvent, IPlayerEvent.BonemealEvent, IPlayerEvent.BreakEvent, IPlayerEvent.ChangedDimension, IPlayerEvent.ChatEvent, IPlayerEvent.ContainerClosed, IPlayerEvent.ContainerOpen, IPlayerEvent.DamagedEntityEvent, IPlayerEvent.DamagedEvent, IPlayerEvent.DiedEvent, IPlayerEvent.DropEvent, IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent, IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent.Added, IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent.Removed, IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent.Ticked, IPlayerEvent.FallEvent, IPlayerEvent.FillBucketEvent, IPlayerEvent.FinishUsingItem, IPlayerEvent.InitEvent, IPlayerEvent.InteractEvent, IPlayerEvent.JumpEvent, IPlayerEvent.KeyPressedEvent, IPlayerEvent.KilledEntityEvent, IPlayerEvent.LevelUpEvent, IPlayerEvent.LightningEvent, IPlayerEvent.LoginEvent, IPlayerEvent.LogoutEvent, IPlayerEvent.MouseClickedEvent, IPlayerEvent.PickUpEvent, IPlayerEvent.PickupXPEvent, IPlayerEvent.ProfileEvent, IPlayerEvent.ProfileEvent.Changed, IPlayerEvent.ProfileEvent.Create, IPlayerEvent.ProfileEvent.Removed, IPlayerEvent.RangedChargeEvent, IPlayerEvent.RangedLaunchedEvent, IPlayerEvent.RespawnEvent, IPlayerEvent.RightClickEvent, IPlayerEvent.SleepEvent, IPlayerEvent.SoundEvent, IPlayerEvent.StartUsingItem, IPlayerEvent.StopUsingItem, IPlayerEvent.TimerEvent, IPlayerEvent.TossEvent, IPlayerEvent.UpdateEvent, IPlayerEvent.UseHoeEvent, IPlayerEvent.UsingItem, IPlayerEvent.WakeUpEvent, IQuestEvent, IQuestEvent.QuestCompletedEvent, IQuestEvent.QuestStartEvent, IQuestEvent.QuestTurnedInEvent, IRecipeEvent, IRecipeEvent.Post, IRecipeEvent.Pre
    public interface IPlayerEvent
extends ICustomNPCsEvent
    Events fired for player actions including combat, items, movement, and interactions.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface Description
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.AchievementEvent
      Fired when the player earns an achievement.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.AttackedEvent
      Fired when the player is attacked (before armor reduction).
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.AttackEvent
      Fired when the player attacks an entity.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.BonemealEvent
      Fired when the player uses bonemeal on a block.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.BreakEvent
      Fired when the player breaks a block.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.ChangedDimension
      Fired when the player changes dimensions.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.ChatEvent
      Fired when the player sends a chat message.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.ContainerClosed
      Fired when the player closes a container.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.ContainerOpen
      Fired when the player opens a container.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.DamagedEntityEvent
      Fired when the player deals damage to an entity (after hit).
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.DamagedEvent
      Fired when the player takes damage (after armor reduction).
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.DiedEvent
      Fired when the player dies.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.DropEvent
      Fired when items are dropped from the player's inventory (e.g., on death).
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent
      Events fired for player custom effects (add, tick, remove).
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.FallEvent
      Fired when the player falls.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.FillBucketEvent
      Fired when the player fills a bucket.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.FinishUsingItem
      Fired when the player finishes using an item (full duration).
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.InitEvent
      Fired when the player script is initialized.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.InteractEvent
      Fired when the player interacts with an entity.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.JumpEvent
      Fired when the player jumps.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.KeyPressedEvent
      Fired when the player presses or releases a key.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.KilledEntityEvent
      Fired when the player kills an entity.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.LevelUpEvent
      Fired when the player levels up.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.LightningEvent
      Fired when the player is about to be struck by lightning.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.LoginEvent
      Fired when the player logs in.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.LogoutEvent
      Fired when the player logs out.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.MouseClickedEvent
      Fired when the player clicks a mouse button.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.PickUpEvent
      Fired when the player picks up an item.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.PickupXPEvent
      Fired when the player picks up experience orbs.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.ProfileEvent
      Events fired for profile operations (create, change, remove).
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.RangedChargeEvent
      Fired when the player begins charging a ranged weapon.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.RangedLaunchedEvent
      Fired when the player launches a ranged weapon (e.g., bow).
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.RespawnEvent
      Fired when the player respawns after death.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.RightClickEvent
      Fired when the player right-clicks.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.SleepEvent
      Fired when the player sleeps in a bed.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.SoundEvent
      Fired when a sound is played for the player.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.StartUsingItem
      Fired when the player starts using an item (e.g., drawing a bow).
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.StopUsingItem
      Fired when the player stops using an item before completion.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.TimerEvent
      Fired when a player timer triggers.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.TossEvent
      Fired when the player tosses a single item.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.UpdateEvent
      Fired each tick for the player.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.UseHoeEvent
      Fired when the player uses a hoe on a block.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.UsingItem
      Fired each tick while the player is using an item.
      static interface  IPlayerEvent.WakeUpEvent
      Fired when the player wakes up from a bed.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface noppes.npcs.api.event.ICustomNPCsEvent

        ICustomNPCsEvent.CNPCNaturalSpawnEvent, ICustomNPCsEvent.ScriptedCommandEvent
